'''wobabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zincographical|zincographical]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zincographical|zincographical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wobabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobabithi|wobabithi]] || [[word:wobabiji|wobabiji]] || [[word:wobabishi|wobabishi]] || [[word:wobabiki|wobabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobabuthuthu|wobabuthuthu]] || [[word:wobabujuju|wobabujuju]] || [[word:wobabushushu|wobabushushu]] || [[word:wobabukuku|wobabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobabuthu|wobabuthu]] || [[word:wobabuju|wobabuju]] || [[word:wobabushu|wobabushu]] || [[word:wobabuku|wobabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobabufthuf|wobabufthuf]] || [[word:wobabufjuf|wobabufjuf]] || [[word:wobabufshuf|wobabufshuf]] || [[word:wobabufkuf|wobabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobabethe|wobabethe]] || [[word:wobabeje|wobabeje]] || [[word:wobabeshe|wobabeshe]] || [[word:wobabeke|wobabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobabothotho|wobabothotho]] || [[word:wobabojojo|wobabojojo]] || [[word:wobaboshosho|wobaboshosho]] || [[word:wobabokoko|wobabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobabotho|wobabotho]] || [[word:wobabojo|wobabojo]] || [[word:wobabosho|wobabosho]] || [[word:wobaboko|wobaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobabofthof|wobabofthof]] || [[word:wobabofjof|wobabofjof]] || [[word:wobabofshof|wobabofshof]] || [[word:wobabofkof|wobabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfthÃŸf|wobabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfjÃŸf|wobabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfshÃŸf|wobabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfkÃŸf|wobabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wobabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wobabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wobabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wobabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfthÃŸf|wobabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfjÃŸf|wobabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfshÃŸf|wobabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfkÃŸf|wobabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfthÃŸf|wobabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfjÃŸf|wobabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfshÃŸf|wobabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobabÃŸfkÃŸf|wobabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobabÃḊthÃḊ|wobabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wobabÃḊjÃḊ|wobabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wobabÃḊshÃḊ|wobabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wobabÃḊkÃḊ|wobabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobabathatha|wobabathatha]] || [[word:wobabajaja|wobabajaja]] || [[word:wobabashasha|wobabashasha]] || [[word:wobabakaka|wobabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobabatha|wobabatha]] || [[word:wobabaja|wobabaja]] || [[word:wobabasha|wobabasha]] || [[word:wobabaka|wobabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobabafthaf|wobabafthaf]] || [[word:wobabafjaf|wobabafjaf]] || [[word:wobabafshaf|wobabafshaf]] || [[word:wobabafkaf|wobabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wobabasha|wobabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wobabshÃḋasha|wobabshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wobabroasha|wobabroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wobabmuasha|wobabmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wobabyaasha|wobabyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowobabnkshÃḋasha|gowobabnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowobabnkroasha|gowobabnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowobabnkmuasha|gowobabnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowobabnkyaasha|gowobabnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wobababasha|wobababasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wobababshÃḋasha|wobababshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wobababroasha|wobababroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wobababmuasha|wobababmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wobababyaasha|wobababyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowobababnkshÃḋasha|gowobababnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowobababnkroasha|gowobababnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowobababnkmuasha|gowobababnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowobababnkyaasha|gowobababnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:webÃḊbasha|webÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:webÃḊbshÃḋasha|webÃḊbshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:webÃḊbroasha|webÃḊbroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:webÃḊbmuasha|webÃḊbmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:webÃḊbyaasha|webÃḊbyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowebÃḊbnkshÃḋasha|gowebÃḊbnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowebÃḊbnkroasha|gowebÃḊbnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowebÃḊbnkmuasha|gowebÃḊbnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowebÃḊbnkyaasha|gowebÃḊbnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wobfabasha|wobfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wobfabshÃḋasha|wobfabshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wobfabroasha|wobfabroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wobfabmuasha|wobfabmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wobfabyaasha|wobfabyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowobfabnkshÃḋasha|gowobfabnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowobfabnkroasha|gowobfabnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowobfabnkmuasha|gowobfabnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowobfabnkyaasha|gowobfabnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
